message:
✨ Add per-card Bug report button to every dashboard card (#1234)

Add a Bug icon button to the CardWrapper toolbar (between expand and
3-dot menu) that opens the Contribute modal with card-specific context
pre-filled. Uses the same Bug icon from lucide-react as the navbar
for consistency.

- Add Bug button to CardWrapper toolbar (appears on all cards automatically)
- Add initialContext prop to FeatureRequestModal for card type/title pre-fill
- Pre-fill textarea with card name and example bug report template
- Add i18n key for report issue tooltip

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -514,6 +514,7 @@
     "refreshFailedRetry_other": "Refresh failed {{count}} times - click to retry",
     "refreshData": "Refresh data",
     "expandFullScreen": "Expand card to full screen",
+    "reportIssue": "Report issue for this card",
     "cardMenuTooltip": "Card menu - configure, replace, or remove",
     "configureTooltip": "Configure card settings like cluster and namespace filters",
     "copyLink": "Copy Link",
